members.name: AddPoint
members.signature: public void AddPoint(Vector2 position, int index)
members.summary: Adds a point with the specified [param position] relative to the polyline's own position. If no [param index] is provided, the new point will be added to the end of the points array. If [param index] is given, the new point is inserted before the existing point identified by index [param index]. The indices of the points after the new point get increased by 1. The provided [param index] must not exceed the number of existing points in the polyline. See [method get_point_count].

members.name: ClearPoints
members.summary: Removes all points from the polyline, making it empty.

members.name: GetPointCount
members.summary: Returns the number of points in the polyline.

members.name: GetPointPosition
members.summary: Returns the position of the point at index [param index].

members.name: RemovePoint
members.summary: Removes the point at index [param index] from the polyline.

members.name: SetPointPosition
members.signature: public void SetPointPosition(int index, Vector2 position)
members.summary: Overwrites the position of the point at the given [param index] with the supplied [param position].

members.name: Antialiased
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the polyline's border will be anti-aliased. [b]Note:[/b] [Line2D] is not accelerated by batching when being anti-aliased.

members.name: BeginCapMode
members.summary: The style of the beginning of the polyline, if [member closed] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: Closed
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] and the polyline has more than 2 points, the last point and the first one will be connected by a segment. [b]Note:[/b] The shape of the closing segment is not guaranteed to be seamless if a [member width_curve] is provided. [b]Note:[/b] The joint between the closing segment and the first segment is drawn first and it samples the [member gradient] and the [member width_curve] at the beginning. This is an implementation detail that might change in a future version.

members.name: DefaultColor
members.summary: The color of the polyline. Will not be used if a gradient is set.

members.name: EndCapMode
members.summary: The style of the end of the polyline, if [member closed] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: Gradient
members.summary: The gradient is drawn through the whole line from start to finish. The [member default_color] will not be used if this property is set.

members.name: JointMode
members.summary: The style of the connections between segments of the polyline.

members.name: Points
members.summary: The points of the polyline, interpreted in local 2D coordinates. Segments are drawn between the adjacent points in this array.

members.name: RoundPrecision
members.summary: The smoothness used for rounded joints and caps. Higher values result in smoother corners, but are more demanding to render and update.

members.name: SharpLimit
members.summary: Determines the miter limit of the polyline. Normally, when [member joint_mode] is set to [constant LINE_JOINT_SHARP], sharp angles fall back to using the logic of [constant LINE_JOINT_BEVEL] joints to prevent very long miters. Higher values of this property mean that the fallback to a bevel joint will happen at sharper angles.

members.name: Texture
members.summary: The texture used for the polyline. Uses [member texture_mode] for drawing style.

members.name: TextureMode
members.summary: The style to render the [member texture] of the polyline.

members.name: Width
members.summary: The polyline's width.

members.name: WidthCurve
members.summary: The polyline's width curve. The width of the polyline over its length will be equivalent to the value of the width curve over its domain. The width curve should be a unit [Curve].

values.name: LINE_CAP_BOX
values.summary: Draws the line cap as a box, slightly extending the first/last segment.

values.name: LINE_CAP_ROUND
values.summary: Draws the line cap as a semicircle attached to the first/last segment.

values.name: LINE_JOINT_BEVEL
values.summary: Makes the polyline's joints bevelled/chamfered, connecting the sides of the two segments with a simple line.

values.name: LINE_JOINT_ROUND
values.summary: Makes the polyline's joints rounded, connecting the sides of the two segments with an arc. The detail of this arc depends on [member round_precision].

values.name: LINE_JOINT_SHARP
values.summary: Makes the polyline's joints pointy, connecting the sides of the two segments by extending them until they intersect. If the rotation of a joint is too big (based on [member sharp_limit]), the joint falls back to [constant LINE_JOINT_BEVEL] to prevent very long miters.

values.name: LINE_TEXTURE_NONE
values.summary: Takes the left pixels of the texture and renders them over the whole polyline.

values.name: LINE_TEXTURE_STRETCH
values.summary: Stretches the texture across the polyline. [member CanvasItem.texture_repeat] of the [Line2D] node must be [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_DISABLED] for best results.

values.name: LINE_TEXTURE_TILE
values.summary: Tiles the texture over the polyline. [member CanvasItem.texture_repeat] of the [Line2D] node must be [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_ENABLED] or [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_MIRROR] for it to work properly.

constants.name: LINE_JOINT_SHARP
constants.summary: Makes the polyline's joints pointy, connecting the sides of the two segments by extending them until they intersect. If the rotation of a joint is too big (based on [member sharp_limit]), the joint falls back to [constant LINE_JOINT_BEVEL] to prevent very long miters.

constants.name: LINE_JOINT_BEVEL
constants.summary: Makes the polyline's joints bevelled/chamfered, connecting the sides of the two segments with a simple line.

constants.name: LINE_JOINT_ROUND
constants.summary: Makes the polyline's joints rounded, connecting the sides of the two segments with an arc. The detail of this arc depends on [member round_precision].

constants.name: LINE_CAP_BOX
constants.summary: Draws the line cap as a box, slightly extending the first/last segment.

constants.name: LINE_CAP_ROUND
constants.summary: Draws the line cap as a semicircle attached to the first/last segment.

constants.name: LINE_TEXTURE_NONE
constants.summary: Takes the left pixels of the texture and renders them over the whole polyline.

constants.name: LINE_TEXTURE_TILE
constants.summary: Tiles the texture over the polyline. [member CanvasItem.texture_repeat] of the [Line2D] node must be [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_ENABLED] or [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_MIRROR] for it to work properly.

constants.name: LINE_TEXTURE_STRETCH
constants.summary: Stretches the texture across the polyline. [member CanvasItem.texture_repeat] of the [Line2D] node must be [constant CanvasItem.TEXTURE_REPEAT_DISABLED] for best results.
